name: I am Neutron
short_description: I am Neutron is a narration and movement based game where you control the character which is a Neutron. You can interact with it by listening to the many unique dialogue it has to say to you.
detailed_description:
I am Neutron is a narration and movement based game where you control the character which is a Neutron. You can interact with it by listening to the many unique dialogue it has to say to you. Enjoy the musical tunes why you explore the vast emptiness of this quantum world. The game is fairly simple at the moment and is meant to be a existential and thought provoking experience.

Walk around on your jacked arms as Neutron the PC. Explore and watch the quantum soup background bubble and perturbate. Listen to the narration that Neutron wants to tell you.

Enjoy the game. I hope to add more in the future.
